chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1722 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 09-05-2024 Mr. Abdul Ahad Buriro, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondents-SIDA. Mr. Rashid Khan Durrani, Advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. Muhammad Ali Zardar, Director, Ghotki Feeder Canal Area Water Board, Ghotki is present. ***** In terms of order dated 27.03.2024, compliance report has been submitted by the officer in attendance. It is stated that petitioner has been promoted to the post of Sub-Engineer (BPS-11). However, his counsel submits that he is senior to Abdul Wahid Kalhoro (respondent No.7). The Director, Ghotki Feeder Canal is present and submits that if the petitioner moves an application claiming his seniority over respondent No.7 or any other, the same will be considered in accordance with law and decided after providing an opportunity of hearing to all concerned not later than one month of moving of such application. Accordingly, petition having served its purpose is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Accordingly, petition having served its purpose is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-07 of 2012 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl in d/o case For hearing of CMA 3516/23 09-05-2024 Mr. Faraz Khan Pathan, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G a/w Dr. Anwar Ali on behalf of DHO, Sukkur. ***** Focal Person, DHO office, Sukkur is present and submits that letter has been sent to the Finance Department for sanction of arrears of petitioners accrued on account of up-gradation of the post and seeks time to obtain response from the Finance Department. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2785 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl in d/o case For hearing of CMA 445/2024 09-05-2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Muhammad Ali, Assistant Commissioner, Kingri. ***** Learned AAG submits that order of this Court has been challenged by National Highway in Supreme Court. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Spl. Anti-Terrorism Acquittal Appeal No.D-05 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 396/24 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on MA 188/24 4.For hearing of main case. 09-05-2024 Syed Asghar Ali Shah Bukhar, Advocate for appellant. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2. One week’s time is granted for compliance of office objection(s). 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Let notice be issued to APG only for a date to be fixed by the office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Let notice be issued to APG only for a date to be fixed by the office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Mr. Bahawal Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutor, NAB. ***** None present for the applicant/petitioner. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
